title: Wellness Wednesday: 3 micro-habits for desk warriors
description: Facebook feed post sharing three tiny daily habits that loosen up the chronic tension office workers carry. Friendly, conversational, slightly longer-form than IG.
hook: Three desk-friendly habits that reset stiff shoulders in under 60 seconds.

cta.text: Which one are you trying this week?

keyMessage: Small, consistent habits beat big infrequent sessions.

strategy.keyMessage: Small, consistent habits beat big infrequent sessions.
strategy.ctaText: Which one are you trying this week?

creativePlan.hook: Three desk-friendly habits that reset stiff shoulders in under 60 seconds.

text.caption:
Three desk-friendly habits that reset stiff shoulders in under 60 seconds:

1. Chin tuck + 3 slow breaths. Your screen pulls you forward; this resets the cervical line.
2. Wrist circles, both directions, 10 each. Typing tightens the forearm fascia more than you think.
3. Stand up, reach overhead, sigh out. A real audible sigh — it cues the parasympathetic.

Not a workout. Not a yoga class. Just enough movement to keep the body from locking in by 3pm.

Which one are you trying this week?
